It is left-aligned within the central container, beginning at the same left grid line as the last-updated banner and title. On desktop, it spans roughly 7–8 of the 12 grid columns (about 60–70% of the container width), creating an optimal line length for text and leaving a comfortable right margin that visually aligns with the right-hand actions and the overlayed chat widget. Each legal section is stacked vertically with 24–32px of spacing between sections and 8–16px between headings and body text, creating a moderately dense but breathable reading experience. Indented subclauses or lists align to the inner 8px grid. The top of the first section starts after a vertical gap of roughly 24px from the section navigation band, making the transition from navigation to reading clear.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Static, scrollable content block that stretches vertically; the page scroll is driven by the height of this component. It does not fix or float but remains aligned to the main grid as the user scrolls.

component_layouts.layout_narrative: The section navigation is positioned just below the prominent page title and above the main terms content, directly mirroring the mockup’s horizontal category filter row. It occupies a full-width row within the central container. The navigation links (e.g., 'All', 'General Terms', 'Payment', 'Shipping', etc.) are arranged in a single horizontal line, centered within the container on large screens but visually starting near the left edge of the text column so they feel connected to the content. Each link has 16–24px horizontal padding and 8–12px vertical padding, maintaining the flat, tab-like appearance of the category filters. The row itself has about 16–24px vertical padding and sits approximately 24px below the title. There is a clear 16–24px gap below this navigation row before the first line of the section list, preserving the layered hierarchy: title → filter-like navigation → content.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Static navigation row in the normal flow; it scrolls away with the rest of the content and does not remain sticky. Interaction may scroll the page to anchor points within the section list but does not alter its physical position.

component_layouts.layout_narrative: The terms search form is placed in a dedicated horizontal band immediately beneath the yellow main header, occupying the same conceptual space as the product search/category bar in the mockup. Within the central container, the search input is positioned slightly left of center, spanning about 60–70% of the container width (roughly 7–8 grid columns). It is horizontally aligned so that its left edge lines up with the left edge of the main text column and its right edge ends before the cart summary, leaving a gap of about 16–24px between them. The input field has generous horizontal padding (16–24px) and vertical padding (10–14px), consistent with the site’s buttons and other inputs. The band itself has a subtle background (e.g., light gray or a softened brand tint) and vertical padding of 16–24px, visually echoing the mockup’s full-width search strip. There is a modest 16px gap between this band and the meta row below, ensuring a clear separation of functional and informational elements.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Static component anchored in a full-width band; scrolls with the page and does not remain visible once the user scrolls past it.

component_layouts.layout_narrative: The contextual actions (e.g., 'Go to checkout', 'Contact support') are positioned in the same horizontal zone as the section navigation, aligned to the far right of the central container to mirror the placement of cart/account icons in the header. On desktop, the section navigation links occupy the left and center portion of the row, while the contextual actions sit on the right end, sharing the same vertical center line. Together, they form a single row across the page. The contextual actions are grouped as 1–3 compact buttons, each taking roughly 1–1.5 grid columns (about 8–12% of container width when combined), with at least 8–16px horizontal spacing between them. Vertical padding matches the navigation row (around 8–12px above and below the button label), and there is a clear 16–24px gap below this row before the main text begins. This placement keeps them easily discoverable without intruding on the reading column.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Static elements within the nav/action row; they scroll with the content and do not float. On narrower viewports they may wrap to a second line under the section navigation, but still remain in the same stacked band.

component_layouts.layout_narrative: The print button is placed adjacent to the contextual actions, at the far right of the same horizontal band that contains the section navigation. It appears as a compact icon button or subtle outlined button, slightly smaller and more subdued than the main contextual actions. It occupies roughly half a grid column in width (about the width of its icon plus 8–12px padding on each side), sitting to the right of the last contextual action with an 8–12px gap. Its alignment matches the right edge of the container, forming a clean right boundary that echoes the alignment of the cart summary above. Vertically, it is centered with the section navigation text and shares the same top and bottom padding, ensuring the entire row feels cohesive. This placement makes printing accessible but clearly secondary to navigation and transactional actions.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Static control within the nav/action band; scrolls away with the page content and does not stick or float.

component_layouts.layout_narrative: The error notice appears in the main content area when the terms cannot be loaded. It is positioned within the same central container as the remaining components, starting just below the last-updated banner and effectively replacing the title/section list in hierarchy. Horizontally, it aligns with the main text column, spanning about 7–8 grid columns, and is centered to maintain visual balance. The notice appears as a card or banner with a lightly tinted background and clear border, with 16–24px padding on all sides and at least 24–32px of whitespace above and below, so it reads as a distinct, important message rather than inline text. When visible, it pushes the section navigation and section list further down or hides them entirely, depending on implementation, but always remains within the same left-aligned column. The layout around it continues to respect the airy spacing of the mockup, keeping the alert easy to scan without overwhelming the page.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Static block component in the normal flow; it occupies the space where the main content would be and scrolls naturally with the rest of the page.
